name: libhttp-message-perl
title: libhttp-message-perl
summary: perl interface to HTTP style messages
description:
perl interface to HTTP style messages
The HTTP::Message distribution contains classes useful for representing the
messages passed in HTTP style communication. These are classes representing
requests, responses and the headers contained within them.
.
The HTTP::Headers class encapsulates HTTP-style message headers. The headers
consist of attribute-value pairs also called fields, which may be repeated,
and which are printed in a particular order. The field names are cases
insensitive.
.
Instances of this class are usually created as member variables of the
HTTP::Request and HTTP::Response classes, internal to the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhttp-message-perl because perl interface to HTTP style messages.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhttp-message-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhttp-message-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhttp-message-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
